arguments.rdx: ASCII string key/name to copy into descriptor-owned UTF-16 storage

full_disassembly_with_comments.comment: save rdx string/key pointer in rdi
save rcx descriptor pointer in rsi
load vtable/type pointer for this descriptor class
strlen loop over rdx ASCII key
reserve/allocate UTF-16 string storage for descriptor
SIMD byte-to-word ASCII -> UTF-16 widening loop
return original descriptor pointer in rax
